name: Reconator
description: Automated reconnaissance framework — FastAPI + React + shadcn/ui

TELEGRAM_API_KEY.description: Telegram bot API key from @BotFather. Leave blank to disable notifications.

TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID.description: Telegram chat id (use @chat_id_echo_bot). Leave blank to disable notifications.

WORKER_POLL_INTERVAL_SECONDS.description: How often the worker polls for queued targets.
